feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through the life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Episode 3. End of the Girl and the Lady.

link.title: Episode 3. End of the Girl and the Lady.

entry.content:
Lady couldn’t hide her astonishment upon the growth rate of little girl.
Ten months have passed since the beginning of education, however the knowledge which girl should be taught of, have mostly dried up by now. In just two more months lady shall tutor her everything.
Although everything is only the information possessed by an adult human being, not truth of the universe.
Inasmuch as girl has an abnormally high abilities, lady often had to rewrite the educational subroutine. But it wasn’t a torment for her in a slightest. Rather lady gleefully kept rewriting it.
Being that lady couldn’t help but feel a tremendous happiness of the girl’s growth. Since she wished to have an equal friend as soon as possible.

“Nevertheless, the level of her abilities doesn’t appear likely to be hold by a human being.”

Lady murmured a mere few words​ as she headed toward the computer.
Thereafter, she slowly turned her head over her shoulder to sent a glance upon exhausted and sleeping girl.
Whump, girl was turning over during a sleep. Lady found the movement so adorable that smile appears on her face.
Lady didn’t have to sleep so instead, during girl sleeps, she made amendments to educational subroutine. Undoubtedly, this shall be the latest revision.
Lady returns her eyes to the computer.
While running her fingers upon the holographic keyboard, in the nook​ of her quantum brain lady speculated about a girl.
The girl who wake up from suspended animation, who wander around, until eventually collapsed.
Who she is?
For what reason girl was in the suspended animation?
Why the girl having no recollection?
Perhaps she is a special human. Level of her intelligence is so excessive that a possibility of putting her to sleep until other humans would catch up appears to be probable.
Girl didn’t have remembrance​ of her past, would it be reasonable to guess that artificial hibernation was incomplete or has something went wrong?
Lately lady have been continuously speculating about nothing but the girl.

“Hey, listen.”

Suddenly, she was called from behind.
Lady didn’t notice a presence of the girl and was a little surprised.
Or else, if the girl had disappeared she would have been too focused to notice.

“What is it?”

While saying that, lady sent a gaze over her shoulder.
Girl’s blue pyjamas were sloppy.
Lady stood up from her seat and aligned girl’s clothes.

“You know, I had a weird dream.”

Girl rubbed her eyes during saying it.

“A dream?”

Lady never dreams.
Autodoll never dreams.

“Yes. A purple flower appeared there.”
“I see. Shall we learn about it with oneiromancy?”
“What is that?”
“A divination​ of dreams based on hypotheses​ that it composed of one’s latent desires and some other implications.”
“Divination​ of dreams?”
“That’s right. Shall we?”
“Uh-huh. Sounds interesting.”

Girl smiles.
Girl has a messy hair due to her sleeping habit, lady found it cute.
Normally in this case lady would brush her hair, but at present reached conclusion that she didn’t have to. Not because girl looks adorable, but since lady guessed that girl would go to sleep once again.

“Which flower was that?”

Lady showed a table of purple flowers on the computer display.

“M―mn,” girl touches a display with her right hand. “Probably this one.”
“An iris?”
“Iris?”
“This flower means a rainbow.”
“Sparking.”
“Yes. These are lovely seven prismatic colours.”
“What is the divination​?”
“Pure amour, an amour fulfilment.”
“Amour, what is it?”
“I guess it’s similar to holding a love for a particular person and the desire to be with them forever.”
“Then, I am in amour with you.”
“Eh?”

An unforeseen statement made lady shoot her eyes open.

“After all, I want to be with you forever, you know? Are you different?”
“No. I’m also thinking this way.”

That’s not a lie. Lady cannot imagine a future without the girl.
Action log of the period when girl wasn’t here is remaining, and can retrieve at any time.
However the future is different. That’s no more than a mere conjectures​.
And in lady’s conjectures regarding the future, girl was always by her side.

“It fulfilled, right,” girl smiled and
“That’s right,” lady patted her head.

Actually an insight towards amour of the girl is slightly off, guessed lady.
However haven’t pronounced it.
Having her head caressed felt good and girl closed her eyes.
Right after that, just like that, breath of the little girl has slowed down.
Lady picked a girl up and laid her on the futon.
By the time when lady returned to computer desk, a question about identity of the girl became irrelevant to her.
Girl is her lovable partner and before long shall take a place of an equal friend.
That is enough.

 

◇

 

Only about a year has passed since lady started educating the girl.
Over that year, girl mastered all the basis of education. No, girl absorbed far beyond knowledge. At present girl became an equal existence with lady.

“Well then, I shall issue a knowledge certificate.”

Lady transmitted a knowledge certificate from her computer tablet to the tablet of the girl.
In a perished world, this certificate of no use whatsoever. Nevertheless, lady wished to visualise the fact of girl becoming an equal to her.
The knowledge certificate stated:『Sufficiently necessary knowledge proved to be contained inside of your ultra-parallel computer《brain》』.
And attached following:『With this, you and me are an equal friends. I’m looking forward to work with you again』.
Heart of the lady was filled with a sense of accomplishment.

“Wha―i,” girl peers into the tablet and launches a smile. “So now I’m full-fledged individual either?”
“Yes.”

Lady strongly nodded.
Since girl’s brain was exceedingly overwhelming the one of a typical human being, educational subroutine was rewritten plenty of times.
From lady’s standpoint it surely was a nice miscalculation. In mere one year girl gained the ability of a stand-alone living.
Supposing if she was an average human, it should have taken a ten years of education.
If humanity was still alive and well, without a doubt, girl must been called this way.
A genius.
Girl’s abilities would have greatly contributed to the leap of humanity. And yet, the human race is no longer, and only her, Autodoll, was in the world.

“I’ve been thinking.”

Says the girl. Her azure pupils were glittering. Although a light of the chandelier is not reflected.

“What is it?”

Lady inclined her head.

“Since I was approved as an individual, I want a name.”
“A name?”
“Yes. Name. I guess you need one either.”

Lady doesn’t think so. Being that they were alone in this world, a proper nouns having not much of point. There is no opportunity to differentiate from other intelligent life-forms.
Mere『I』and『you』exists here. It is invariant​ from her point of view or the point of view of the little girl. If that’s a case, they bound to continue with『I』and『you』as before.
However

“You may think of name in consideration a possibility of encountering another intelligent life-form hereafter​.”

lady lives efficiently and logically. Hence ignorant of conclusions from reasoning. She doesn’t afraid to adopt to something novel as well.
For evolution changes are necessary. It’s impossible to continuously doing the same thing and gain a different results.

“Alright!” Girl, with her hands together, expresses her joy. “You know, I would like you to think up a name for me. I’d wish to ask could I please choose the name for you, but I’ve already pondered of your name.”
“Eh?”
“Ah, was it no good?”

Being that lady was a little surprised, pouting girl hung her head down.

“No, no at all,” lady shakes both of her hands in panic. “No, not bad at all. Rather I’m happy. I was just slightly surprised.”
“Really?”

Girl turned her gaze up to look upon the lady.
Heart of lady tightly squeezed. However, the tightening by no means an unpleasant. On the contrary, there was an instant desire to hug a girl.
However lady restrains herself.

“That is the truth. I’m really, really pleased that you pondered of a name for me.”
“Good-“

Whew, hearing lady’s words, girl stroked down her chest in relief.
Shortly thereafter, girl showed a smile that looks as though she come up with a mischief.

“Want to hear it?”

Whereas lady expected to hear a name, girl merely made the air more pretentious. Lady quickly realised, girl was enjoying such an exchange.
Therefore, decided to go along with girl’s delivery.

“Of course,” lady leaned forward and then “Quickly,” complained. “Please tell me.”

What kind of name girl will give me? Although lady doesn’t have a heart, she had a feeling of her heart pounding in an uplifted mood.

“Um. You’re very kind, you know?”
“Is that so?”

For lady it is unknown whether she kind, ethics subroutine functioning normally.

“That’s right. Didn’t you notice it yourself?”
“Yes, I didn’t recognise it.”
“Then recognise it now.”
“Yes. I am kind.”
“All right.”

Puffing her chest out, girl smiled.

“Well, your hair looks like a deep darkness, isn’t it beautiful?”
“Like a, darkness?”

It was a rare expression, judged lady. Usually you’d simply describe it as a black hair.

“Uh-huh. Poetic and wonderful, right?”
“Indeed. A wordplay.”

Girl likes literature and poetry.

“Therefore, your name is written as Yuu and Yami - Yuuyami. How is it?”1

Girl fixed her gaze directly upon the lady. Her pupils had a mixture of slight anxiety and great anticipation.
Lady began verification of the name Yuuyami.
Before anything else, the sound. Yuuyami. Flawless​. Lovely.
Yuuyami. Absolutely beautiful.
Next is the kanji. Kind, darkness.
Normally darkness doesn’t use much as a description of something nice. However girl is different. Kind darkness. Whereas one drifting upon the sea of ​​consciousness, life is surely begirt by the kind darkness. Lady reckoned in such manner.

“I like it,” smiles lady. “Thank you very much. I am pleased with it.”

That’s the truth. Lady fundamentally can’t lie. Not because she don’t have to, but since lady doesn’t possess such subroutine. Lady doesn’t feel necessity to create that sort of subroutine hereafter as well.

“Hoora―y.”

Girl showed a triumphant pose.

“Well then, I have to choose a name for you.”
“Uh-huh. Give me a cute name.”

Girl pointed a gaze full of anticipation upon the lady.
Lady picked one hundred names which were popular amongst Caucasian females from the database.
Then, she layers every single of these one hundred names over the girl, one at the time. And proceed to compare names with a mental image of the girl.
This is very important. Mentally and physically it should be as close to the girl as possible. Name Pochi rarely associated with a lion.
Association. Lady’s database a structure of general relations, in which data constellation are linked. Therefore, simultaneously​ with a name, meaning can also be superimpose over the girl.
Founded a certain name, lady suspended operation. She felt as though a name was suitable for the girl.

“How about Lydia?”

The word Lydia has nearly no associations. The name of asteroid, or so relevant as a name of flourished bygone kingdom.2 In other words, name is close to blank paper.
Girl has lost her recollection and began anew, similar to blank paper. Therefore, since it has a seldom​ implications, lady reached a conclusion it would be a nice name for the girl, any meaning can be acquired in the future.
Moreover, the name Lydia sounds exceedingly nice.

“Lydia, Lydia… Um, cute.”

With contentment girl smiled to signify her delight.

“Well then, hence you are Lydia and I am Yuuyami.”
“Uh-huh. Although both of us can work stand-alone, we can help each other as well. That’s to say, friends. Please take care of me, Yuuyami.”
“Yes. Likewise, please, Lydia.”

Lady became Yuuyami,
girl became Lydia.

  1. first - is part of 優しい [Yasashii] - kind, gentle, graceful, 優 [Yuu], while second - 闇 [Yami] - darkness; back

  2. Lydia - Wikipedia; back

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: Lady couldn’t hide her astonishment upon the growth rate of little girl. Ten months have passed since the beginning of education, however the knowledge which girl should be taught of, have mostly dried up by now. In just two more months lady shall tutor her everything.

entry.title: Episode 2. Snow-coloured World.
entry.content:
“Friends?”

Slightly tilting her head, little girl and asked a question in return.

“Yes. Upon the time when my consciousness had sprouted I was already alone, so I never had friends.”

Indifferently stated lady.

“Huh? You wasn’t conscious before the world has perish?”
“I was not. It happened after the world’s collapse that I woke my ego, recognised myself, and became conscious.”
“Is that so. It’s lonely, right.”
“Yes it is, probably.”
“Probably?”
“I’m not quite sure. I’m lonely, probably. Perhaps I kept exploring with a goal to meet you.”
“The way you putting it makes me a little happy.”

Girl cast her eyes downwards. Then it was a fateful encounter, right? She whispered in her mind.

“Thereupon, would you like to become friends with me?”

Girl raised her head and answered “Okay” without any hesitation.
Young girl also has no friends. Far from it, lady is a sole person she could rely on. There is no reason to refuse.

“Thank you very much. I’m glad.”
“I’m glad either. Please take care of me.”
“Likewise.”

With that being case lady raised her right hand, girl did the same.

“Well then, before anything else I shall begin educating you. Because as we are now, it’s impossible to name it as an equal relationship.”
“Is that so?”
“Yes. I’m guessing you doesn’t have the knowledge for stand-alone activity, as an individual.”
“Is that troubling?”
“Yes. Supposing for some reason I get a malfunction, you will come to nothing​ likewise. In other words, at present you compelled to rely upon me. It cannot be called an equal. The friendship is an equal relationship.”
“I see,” girl deeply nodded. “Well then, education.”

Girl knows the definition of education, as well as she was aware studying is very fun. Nevertheless, she do not recall practically receiving education in the past.

“I shall utilise an educational methods which were in use by humankind in older days, before they perished, and structure it with reference to general amount knowledge.”
“Understood.”

Girl showed a smile.

“Well then, without a delay.”

With that being said lady stood up, in panic girl got up as well. The thin taoruketto1 which was covering girl lightly fell down.
Being that air conditioning in the room functioning perfectly, an exaggerated futon unnecessary.
For the girl it is hitherto unknown, however the air conditioning was working only for her sake. Inasmuch as lady fundamentally doesn’t need an air conditioning.

“You can go to sleep,” suggested lady.
“Um. But, maybe I don’t wish you to be alone.”
“All right.”

Lady bring her hips down once again. The movement was exceedingly elegant. Lady surely knows a graceful manner of sitting, thought the girl.

“Hey, I’m thirsty.”
“It is a part of an energy supply activities of human beings. Humans cannot live without a regular liquid intake.”
“You do not drink a water?”
“I am not. My source of energy is the Power Cell.”
“Power Cell?”
“I shall explain you someday. What beverage​ would you like? However because there is only a simple Food Maker I cannot produce an elaborate things.”
“Simple Food Maker?”

Girl do not recall what it is.

“It is a simplified version of the Food Maker.”
“Um. I thought so. And the Food Maker?”
“Let’s see, the Food-Maker,” says lady. “It’s a machine consisting of database section, which records the molecular structure of various dishes, and printer section that re-emerge the molecular structure.”
“Does that means it is possible to reproduce recorded food just like that?”
“Yes. Would you like to listen to more detailed explanation?”
“Uh-huh.”
“For reproduction molecular structure it can consume not a mere electric power also it can utilise just a small amount of water, so if you will re-emerge the water in Food Maker endlessly and use it as a material, it can operate as semi-perpetual motion engine. Being that important, I shall repeat once again, it doesn’t require electricity.”
“Really? It’s convenient, right.”
“That surely is,” lady lightly nods. “The technology has changed a history of humankind. Incidentally, nutrition of humanity on ninety percent was relied on Food Makers and simple Food Makers.”
“I see,” girl deeply nodded. “So the simplified version is here, right?”
“Yes. Being that Food Makers are large machines, they aren’t placed in public places. Naturally, in ordinary households as well.”
“What’s the other difference, other than size?”
“Decreased a number of recorded dishes. In addition, complex cookery cannot be reproduced. They were trying to save a space in the database and printer section.”
“Is that how it is. Thank you for explanation.”
“You are welcome. As a side note, it is possible to exchange the cooking data.”
“Ah, well, what about café au lait​?”

Girl has no recollection of drinking it. And yet, she felt as though she liked it.

“Café au lait​?” Asks lady. “I wonder if the data included?”
“Um,” says the girl. “I want to drink café au lait​.”
“The data for café au lait​ should have been included.”

Lady gets up again. After that, she offer a hand to the girl.

“Shall we go together?”
“Uh-huh.”

Young girl took her hand.
A soft and a little warm hand.

 

◇

 

“Boring.”

One day, girl suddenly resigned from everything.
It was for the first time, a three month after lady began educating her.

“Boring?” Lady calmly analyses. “Not fascinating. Without a worth. Having no point​. Not enjoyable. Not interesting, is that what you mean?”

Whump, girl lied down on the library floor.
After that,

“Um, perhaps that’s it.”

stretched out while saying so.
While sitting opposite to the girl, lady put a tablet which she used for teaching on the floor and pointing her gaze upon the girl.
Until just yesterday there was no signs of girl being bored.
Even the lady aware that a brain of humans gets tired of similar tasks. Hence lady taught a girl various sorts of things, in order to avoid repetition.
Naturally, she was making a breaks to play with the girl.

“Aren’t you being worn-out?” Lady inclines her head.
“I’m not tired. I can run from one side of the library to other.”
“Is that so. What is the problem then? My teaching method?”
“U―m,” after humming, girl rising up. “Your method of teaching is perfect. It’s easy to understand and fun, you know?”
“It is fun? Despite it being tedious?”

Lady tilted her head in opposite direction.
Girl’s statements are contradictory, judged lady.

“Studying is fun, you know. It’s wonderful to learn new things. But, I believe being in the same flow day in, day out made me lose interest.”
“You recognised insufficiency of motivation?”
“Um. Maybe, I guess so.”
“I see. I shall try to improve the educational subroutine and make it more stimulating.”

Lady quickly stands up.

“This can wait until tomorrow. Can we, do something fun, right now?”
“Hmm.”

Lady taking a thought.
How could she satisfy the girl at present?
Offer her a book? No. That would be another daily routine.
There is nothing new in this library. Over past three months girl already has seen everything here.
If that’s the case, reckon​s lady.
It shall be good to show what she hasn’t seen yet.
For instance, right,
the world.

 

◇

 

Girl was leaded out of the library by lady.
When girl opened her eyes she became breathless.
The world was pure white.
A white lightly dancing and soft-looking objects were falling down the sky.

“This is a snowscape,” stated lady.
“Beautiful,” said the girl.

Girl knew what the snow is. But saw it for the first time.
With her hand leaded by lady, girl strolled through the snow.

“It’s crispy.”

She enjoyed a sensation of the snow. Even through the snow boots softness was transmitted.
When girl and lady turned their heads back, a footprints were still remaining behind them.
I wonder would our footprints will remain in this world? Thought the girl.
Lady released girl’s hand and briskly walked alone.

“Don’t leave me behind-“

After girl says so, lady turned around. The next moment lady showed a broad smile and crouched down.
What’s wrong? Thought girl.
Lady collected a snow with her hand, rolled it up, and threw it at the girl.
A snowball hit a face of little girl and shattered. Fluttering fragments are pretty, were her thoughts.
But more than that

“Why are you attacking me?”

girl was worried about lady’s reckless action.
It didn’t hurt, however girl was a little anxious. She wondered if lady’s electric circuit is out of order.

“This is the game called a snowball fight.”
“Game?”
“Yes. Roll the snow into the ball and throw. It didn’t hurt, right?”
“Uh-huh.”
“This is safe activity.”

With that said, lady prepared a second ball.

“Can I evade it?”
“You can.”

Lady slowly released a second snowball.
Snowball flies in a smooth arc. Girl estimated trajectory and shifted the position.
Snowball was evaded, however snow caught her foot and she fell on her back.
It didn’t hurt however, so girl simply continued lying on the snow.

“Are you alright?”

Lady asked in louder voice than usual.

“I’m fine,” girl smiles. “It’s fun.”

Abruptly rising, girl also made a snowball.

“Here I go-“

And then, with a vigorous swish​, threw it at lady.
I guess lady would easily evade it, thought the girl.
However lady didn’t took any evasive actions.
A snowball thrown by the girl directly hit lady’s head and shatter to pieces thereafter.

“Nice control.”

Good, lady gripped her right hand and raised a thumb.

“I thought you should evade it.”
“I wanted to experience being hit as well.”
“Is that so?”
“That is so.”
“And, what is your impression?”
“It’s fun, isn’t it?”

After that, the pair enjoyed throwing a snow at each other for a while.
Before long girl ran out of stamina and snowball fight came to the end.
Girl lies down in the snow, lady also was lying next to her.

“Snow is wonderful.”
“I also find it such.”
“Thank you.”
“For what?”
“For snowscape and a snowball fight.”
“It’s okay. This is a part of education.”
“Is that so?”
“Well, not only that, also because I wanted to play with you.”

Girl was very happy to hear these words.
After that, for a some time, pair was gazing up at the sky.
The air is chilly but clear, weather was cold but peaceful, time was comfortably flowing by.
Right when

“Why is it vanished-?”

girl suddenly asked that.

“What?”

Lady raised upper body and shifted her gaze to the girl.

“The world.”

The beautiful, pure white, endlessly empty world.

“Let’s see. Being that nothing is left here, there is no way to learn it.”
“Here is no hazardous substance for me, so it’s not a nuclear winter. This isn’t a large-scaled diastrophism either.”

Girl already has a plenty of knowledge. However she couldn’t grasp the situation in the world no matter what.

“How about a satellite weapons, it could destroy molecular structure?”

Extracting from several existing possibilities, lady spoke up a random statement.

“Does it can destroy nothing but surface?”
“It could be set to destroy only a molecular structure of the ground, couldn’t it?”
“With pattern-matching or something?”
“Yes.”
“Hmm. If that’s was a method, then who have erased the world and for what advantage?”
“I don’t know. We have no conclusive evidence of it being destroyed by a personal intention in the first place.”
“Even so, someone must’ve destroyed it for their advantage? If they used a satellite weapons.”
“How about it? That could have been a malfunction or an operation error.”
“U―m.”

Girl pondered, but couldn’t find a convincing answer.
Instead, she utters what just came to her mind.

“I want to eat a warm soup.”

Change of the subject. Lady stiffened, since it was so unforeseen, only for two seconds however, and instantly smiled.

“That’s right. Shall we make it with the corn.”

Having said that, lady stood up and reached her hand out to the girl.

  1. type of bed linen resembling a large beach towel and used to cover oneself in a hot weather; back

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: “Friends?” Slightly tilting her head, little girl and asked a question in return. “Yes. Upon the time when my consciousness had sprouted I was already alone, so I never had friends.” Indifferently stated lady.

entry.title: Episode 1. Nameless Pair.
entry.content:
When girl woke up, she was blank.
She couldn’t grasp neither who nor where she was.
Despite that, she was feeling calm.
Gradually, girl begin to perceive the surroundings.
This place is bright, the air clean and ceiling high.
A chandelier hangs down the ceiling. It’s glitters lovely, thought the girl.
For three seconds little girl gazed upon chandelier. Nevertheless, no signs of changes have appeared.
After girl took a deep breath, she raised her upper body. She tightly gripping and rapidly open​ both of the hands. Moved up and down each of her leg, in order.
Uh-huh, girl nodded. Body is functioning properly.
Whew, girl stroked her chest in relieve, at the same time​: “Good morning,” girl heard a feminine voice.
Girl was frightened, she thought her heart would stop. Thus, she pressed upon her own chest to reassure - good, it haven’t stopped.
Girl merely moved a head to point her gaze in direction of the voice.
Beside the girl was sitting lady1. She seemed to be completely as though a sculpture or doll, not a living existence.
By her appearance, she looked like a seventeen or eighteen year old Japanese lady. A charming long black hair, forelock cut in a straight line.
Her constitution is average. However the clothes she wearing is a little eccentric. That is a modest maid outfit. Skirt is awfully long, it covered most of the legs.
Her lineaments are delicate and fair. Each part was flawless​, so was and overall harmony. Being that the lady is so beautiful, girl felt a little awkward.

“Good morning.”

Said lady in a very fluent Japanese. A pleasant velvet voice. Girl had a feeling, to recite a poem​ would suit her.

“Given that my voice is normal, if it doesn’t get transmitted, it’s probably an abnormality of your hearing sensor. Is a lip reading available?”

Lady has not even change her facial expression, just indifferently said so. Since it was so impersonal, for a moment girl didn’t notice that it was a question.
Two seconds later girl recognised a question and answered aloud: “I hear.”
Voice of the girl is not a velvet like lady’s, but immature, undeveloped one. Girl didn’t grieve about it, just a little disappointed.

“Is that so. Then, what about name?”
“Your?”
“No, yours.”
“Mine?”
“That’s right.”

U―m, girl hummed. However no matter how much she dived into the sea of her ​​memories, she couldn’t imagine the past self. She hummed for a while, nonetheless couldn’t recollect anything.

“I don’t know.”

Girl shrugged her miniature shoulders.

“I see. A memory disorder? Shall we perform an examination?”
“Examination?”
“Yes. I’m not a medical type, however I guess I can handle it with a reference to the database.”

Girl slightly tilted her head.
Lady also inclined her head similarly.

“Who are, you?”
“I am a fourth generation of AD. The LM series, type Ⅱ.”

Girl tilted her head to the other side. Her hair ran down the cheek.
Hair of little girl is bright blonde and wavy-ish.

“My hair, it’s sparkling.”

The luminance of the room could be seen through girl’s hair.

“Yes. I find it very pretty.”

Lady launch a smile.
What a gentle smile, thought the girl.

“Hey, what is AD?”
“AD is an abbreviation for Autodoll. Do you know what Autodoll is?”
“Don’t really kn…” Upon the moment girl said that, something flashed through her mind. “…ow. I know, probably.”

It wasn’t a piece of memory however. As a knowledge, girl was aware of an Autodoll. Although it is unknown, has a girl ever been involved with Autodoll.

“Is that so.” Lady nodded.
“It’s a generic name​ of an expensive robots, isn’t it?”
“Correct. For more details, it should be good to review the database later.”
“You are robot, right?”
“Yes, I am. However I possess a consciousness.”
“Consciousness? Not a will?”
“Right. Nothing but consciousness dwell in myself. I am an intelligent life-form.”
“Is that how it is.”

Girl easily accepted her words. According to knowledge of the girl, robots aren’t conscious. Despite that, girl believed lady was, since she asserts to be.

“Am I an AD either?”
“No. You are species that called a human.”
“How is it different?”

Girl had no knowledge of humanity.

“Regarding that, it should be also good to review the database later, for more details. Now, I shall just say that a body components are different.”

The girl looked down at her own body and then examined lady. She observed it for a several seconds, and it didn’t seem to have much of difference.

“The outward appearance is not so different. Being that we, AD, are designed for humankind. However the internal parts completely different.”
“Is that how it is.”
“Yes. But we shall return to the previous subject, do you want to perform an examination?”

Girl shook her head sideways.

“Is it a refusal gesture?”
“It’s not a strong refusal, you know,” girl smiled. “It’s just wouldn’t make a difference, I feel.”
“So, you don’t have to?”
“Uh-huh. Because it’s not important.”
“What is not?”
“The recollection.”
“Your action log is not important?”
“Uh-huh. It’s meaningless to me.”
“Why is it meaningless?”
“I wonder, sensuously I’m fine, it seems.”
“Yes. So?”
“Er, perhaps I didn’t have any remembrance…​ originally.”
“I consider it is unlikely. By eye, your age is from twelve to fourteen years old. In other words, you should have been operating for this period.”
“U―m.”

Lady also has a point, thought the girl. However she didn’t feel necessity to forcefully awake her memory.
At this moment girl is born anew. That’s fine.
Name will be chosen from now on, the memories will be made from here on. There was no particular inconvenience.

“However I shan’t force you.”
“I see. Then don’t worry about it.”
“Understood. Well then, we shall not worry about it,” lady quickly yield to​ the girl. “Instead, please, let me perform a regular health check. Just in case.”
“Alright. Please be gentle, okay?”
“Yes. I shall be careful.”

Then a silence fell for a moment while they gazed upon each other.

“Err,” Girl says apologetically. “Are we going to do it right now?”
“No. I am not in hurry.”
“Is that how it is.”
“Yes, so it is. I have plenty of time.”
“If you have a time, then describe mine appearance?”
“Alright. By eye, you’re half Caucasian and half Mongoloid race, I guess. Skin is so white that it reminiscent me of a snowscape.”
“Snowscape?”

Although girl knows what the snow is, she couldn’t imagine appearance of it.

“I’m trying to convey, it’s beauteous.”

Complimented by lady, girl’s cheeks dyed.

“I shall continue,” says Lady. “Your height approximately one hundred fifty-two centimetres. Body weight is about thirty nine kilogram. Although it’s below average, since you have just awakened from suspended animation, I guess it’s possible to assert as healthy.”
“Wait a minute.”
“Alright.”
“How do you able to figure out my weight by an eye measurement?”
“Aah.” Lady nods.
“That’s because I was holding you in my arms.” Lady showed a gesture of holding a luggage in both arms. “Since I carried you here.”
“Is that so,” girl nods. “Where did you bring me from?”
“It was about forty-four kilometres north from here. I rescued you, being that you lost consciousness.”
“And what happened forty-four kilometres away from here?”

Girl is aware of kilometre unit. She do not know concrete, yet she believed it was a long distance.

“To me? Or to you?”
“Each.”
“You have lost your consciousness.”
“I heard that just now, you know. Why did I fainted?”
“I reached the conclusion you was debilitated, since after awakening from suspended animation you moved around without nutritions. Given that I provided a necessary treatment, right now you are not in a weakened state.”
“I see. Thank you for your help.”
“Ethics subroutine is functioning properly, so that was natural of me, to help you.”
“Hmm,” says the girl. “So what was you doing there?”
“An exploration. I’m successively exploring the surface around here. With intention of discovering something novel.”
“Something like myself?”
“That is right. It was the first time I have ran across a life-form other than myself since I began exploring.”
“There’s no other life-forms?”
“Not within a radius of forty kilometres. If I would explore further, I might encounter life-forms again. However, I doubt there is many.”
“Why?”
“Because the world was perished.”
“Why was it perished?”
“I don’t know. I am LM series… abbreviation for Library Management series.”
“Uh-huh,” girl listened.
“So my occupation is to manage this library.”
“Is this, a library?”

Girl looks around.
Certainly, numerous computer terminals are lined up, plenty of bookcases can be found alongside.
A scenery matched appearance of the general library which girl had in her mind. However she didn’t remember actually visiting a library.

“Yes. This is an underground library. It is build so solid that it can also act as a shelter in case of emergency.”
“Hmm.”
“I shall continue,” says lady. “Upon that day I was cleaning the library, as usual. Before opening. Having done that, an impact took a place, and the external power supply has cut off. Since it never restored, I switched to private power generator, and after that, when I verified outside, the world was destroyed.”
“Does that mean you are still using a private power generator?”
“Yes. I guess it would endure for another twenty years. However, just in case, I’m additionally working upon solar panel installation project.”
“Really?”
“To conclude this, reason as for why the world was perished remains unclear.”
“I see. Well, it’s ruined, so it can’t be helped.”

Girl shrugged her shoulders.
For a girl, world didn’t exist from the beginning. Whether it has been perished or prospered, she do not remember anything.
Therefore, it doesn’t matter which one. No reason to grieve or rejoice.

“May I change a subject?” Asks lady.
“It’s okay. Change it as much as you like,” answers the girl.
“Alright. Would you like to become friends with me?”

  1. I named her “lady”, however in Japanese she referred with a specific word - [Konojo] which translates as she, while the girl - [Shoujo] - girl; back

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: When girl woke up, she was blank. She couldn’t grasp neither who nor where she was. Despite that, she was feeling calm. Gradually, girl begin to perceive the surroundings. This place is bright, the air clean and ceiling high. A chandelier hangs down the ceiling. It’s glitters lovely, thought the girl.

entry.title: First Acquaintance With Manga, Ranobe… In Short - With Japan. And Briefly About the New Website.

link.title: First Acquaintance With Manga, Ranobe… In Short - With Japan. And Briefly About the New Website.

entry.content:
Hello. This is the first actual post on my website powered by GitHub. I’m Sakkani, the one who established group sakkamade.

This time I’d like to narrate about my first acquaintanceship with Japanese fiction and movies.

With manga I became familiar not a long ago. That was, if I recall correctly, in August of 2019. And the name of it - “Citrus”. Finding it after casual encounter with some fan-art, firstly I watched an anime. At that time, my novice self didn’t possessed a knowledge that all anime are based on manga. I presume that was a second anime I’ve ever seen. Late bloomer, huh. Rather, I was never a favour of movies and TV-shows.
“Citrus” remains as the one of my favourite anime and manga up until now. “The one of” since not too long ago to the very top came an anime “Liz to Aoi Tori”. And manga… Hmm, I wonder, there were plenty of nice pieces.

The first Japanese novel I read was “I Favor the Villainess”. Best part I consider the story about Rei’s past.
Discovered it in March of 2020 via fan-artwork as well, but this time it was in the translator’s credits of some manga. Read it up to August of the same year (mainly in August, in couple of days.) Gosh, what’s wrong with this August. And ever since then I’ve started to read much more novels and less manga.
It’s so hard to find an interesting one, gosh…
Favourite novel is “Adachi to Shimamura”. No doubt.

Now a little about the website.
Work on it almost completed, in sense - I already can post here without any problems and you can read. However, I guess, there’s still a lot of things needs to be done.
I don’t think here will be likes and comments, so, if you really wish to talk with me, I can think up and do something about it.
This website will have an Atom feed (RSS). Although I have no idea how does it work, there shouldn’t be any problems with notifications of new posts, if you know how to use it.

Well, that’s it for now. Best regards.
entry.summary: Hello. This is the first actual post on my website powered by GitHub. I’m Sakkani, the one who established group sakkamade. This time I’d like to narrate about my first acquaintanceship with Japanese fiction and movies.
